result.markdown: --- title: "" --- ## Week 3 ### Day 1 #### [Today]{style="color:red;"} - University Holiday / No class today #### [Assigned]{style="color:red;"} ### Day 2 (lab) #### [Today]{style="color:red;"} - Lecture: Likelihood and Optimization - Lecture: Regression - Lecture Code: Likelihood.R and regression.R - Downloads: Files - Install R packages: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # CRAN packages install.packages(c("marginaleffects","ggResidpanel")) ``` ::: #### [Assigned]{style="color:red;"} - Fieberg Ch 14 ##### **In Class Discussion Questions for Duscoff et al.2019** - What is biological significance and statistical significance? - What is a p-value and what are the issues with null hypothesis testing?
